name: pilot-core
description: Shared governance utilities for full-stack Microsoft projects: commit conventions, PR templates, code-health checks, the dependency-supply-chain policy layer over dotnet/npm vulnerability scanning (patch-cadence SLAs, version-pinning, private-feed policy, SBOM), incident-response runbook/postmortem governance, open-source license compliance, safe test-data management for lower environments, Architecture Decision Record discipline, local full-stack dev-environment onboarding, and dedicated search-service integration (Azure Cognitive Search/Elasticsearch) governance
